title: தமிழகத்தில் 10ஆம் தேதி முதல் வெப்ப அலை வீசக்கூடும் - Tamil Murasu
full_text:
A heatwave is likely to occur in Tamil Nadu from the 10th.
The Chennai Meteorological Department forecasts a heatwave in Tamil Nadu starting April 10th, with northern and coastal regions expected to experience more intense heatwaves than usual, potentially causing heat stress. Maximum and minimum temperatures will be recorded across the state, with northern districts like Chennai, Tiruvallur, and Vellore particularly affected. The department also anticipates a severe Agni Nakshatram (Kathiri Veyil) this year. Consequently, most Tamil Nadu schools will be closed for summer holidays from April 16th to June 15th.
